summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Balance & Withdrawal system in admin dashboard. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI properly implemented with balance tab as first tab, 4 balance cards displayed, and withdrawal functionality with proper validation.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (mateusbpugli@gmail.com / MateusBuarque1101)
GET /api/admin/balance returns correct balance data structure
POST /api/admin/withdraw validates pix key minimum 5 chars
Balance tab appears as first tab in admin dashboard
Balance tab shows 4 cards: Saldo Disponivel, Receita Total, Taxa Plataforma, Total Sacado
Sacar button visible and correctly disabled when balance is 0
All previous admin tabs still work: Campanhas, Loja, Galeria, Biografia, Newsletter, Config. Site
Balance calculations work correctly (total revenue - 5% platform fee - withdrawals)
Withdrawal form includes amount input, pix key type selector, and pix key input
Pix key types supported: CPF, CNPJ, Email, Telefone, Chave Aleatoria

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All balance and withdrawal APIs working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Balance tab UI and withdrawal form properly implemented
